summary: Tested the redesigned /teaching-load-report page (new modern design system) end-to-end. Backend pytest 6/6 PASS against /api/teaching-load/report/advanced (all departments, by-teacher, no-filter, unauthorized). Frontend Playwright UI tests confirm the new layout renders correctly: page title 'تقارير العبء التدريسي', breadcrumb 'الرئيسية > تقارير العبء', active semester badge with '(النشط)', filter card 'إعدادات التقرير', semester chips (with green dot on active), scope tabs (قسم كامل / معلم محدد), department chips, blue 'عرض التقرير' button, and empty-state card with chart icon + 'اختر المعايير أولاً'. Teacher-scope flow works: clicking scope-teacher reveals the search box, focus opens a dropdown listing 3 teacher rows (each with testID `teacher-row-{id}` and avatar), and clicking a row replaces the dropdown with the green selected-teacher chip (checkmark visible). Switching back to scope-department + clicking a dept chip ('الشريعة والقانون') + run-report-btn loads the report. All 6 colored stat cards render with correct labels (إجمالي المعلمين=2, لديهم عبء=1, مقرر بدون معلم=0, حمل زائد=0, متوسط الساعات=1.5, مقرر مسند=1/1) and the 3 pill-style tabs with numeric badges all toggle correctly. Comparison tab shows teacher cards with avatar, status badge ('منخفض' orange / 'بدون مقررات' gray), 10px progress bar with colored fill, percentage + 'X من Y ساعة', and course chips (book icon + name+code+section). Unassigned-courses tab shows the success empty-state (green checkmark + 'ممتاز!'). Idle-teachers tab shows the idle teacher card (gray right-border, person icon, employee_id badge, نصاب badge, chevron-back at left). No bugs detected. All required testIDs (back-btn, run-report-btn, scope-department, scope-teacher, teacher-search, teacher-row-{id}) reach the DOM as data-testid.

issues: Duplicate page title — the top app-bar (from the layout) shows 'تقارير العبء التدريسي' and the new in-page header repeats the same title 18px below. Not a regression of this redesign but worth checking if the visual stack should hide one of them. Visible in the initial screenshot.

action_items: Optional: hide the duplicate top-bar page title on /teaching-load-report (the layout's app bar already shows the same Arabic string).
critical_code_review_comments: teaching-load-report.tsx is 707 lines — above the 700-line guideline. Consider extracting StatCard, TabBtn, TeacherCompareCard, UnassignedCourseItem and IdleTeacherItem into a separate /components folder for maintainability.
STATUS_COLORS map is defined module-scope and uses Ionicons name strings as `any` — adding the `Ionicons.glyphMap` keyof would catch typos at compile time.

Archived-banner branch (report.is_archived) was not exercised in this run because no archived semester was selected; the code path is present and correct but un-verified end-to-end. Consider seeding an archived semester for future regression coverage.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all testIDs reachable, all 4 tabs render correct content, scope switching, semester chip selection, dept chip selection, teacher search + dropdown + selection chip, run report, and back-btn all work)

seed_data_creation: None. Used existing data: 4 departments, 3 semesters (active = الفصل الصيفي 2024-2025), and 2 teachers in الشريعة والقانون department (زين سالم with 1 course at 25% load, حسن صالح idle at 0%). 1 unassigned course earlier in iteration_29 — now assigned, so unassigned-courses tab correctly shows the success empty state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Redesign of /teaching-load-report is verified working. Backend endpoint /api/teaching-load/report/advanced returns the full structure expected by the new UI (summary{} with total_teachers, teachers_with_load, courses_without_teacher, overloaded_teachers, average_weekly_load, courses_assigned, total_courses, teachers_without_courses) + teacher_comparison[] (teacher_id, teacher_name, status in {optimal,overload,low,none}, usage_percentage, assigned_weekly_hours, max_weekly_hours, courses_count, courses[]) + courses_without_teacher[] + teachers_without_courses[]. The archived-banner branch (testID='archived-banner') is implemented but was not exercised because the test DB has no archived semester selected — flag for next iteration if an archived-semester report is needed. Test files: /app/backend/tests/test_teaching_load_report.py, /app/backend/tests/test_teacher_courses_assign.py.
